goal: Add THREE INDEPENDENT, non-overlapping pure-utility modules to src/lib, each in its own NEW file with its own unit tests (node --test via tsx), sharing NO files with each other so they can be implemented fully in parallel: (1) src/lib/slug.ts — slugify(text): lowercases, trims, replaces non-alphanumerics with single hyphens, strips leading/trailing hyphens; (2) src/lib/num.ts — clamp(value, min, max) and roundTo(value, decimals), handling NaN/Infinity safely; (3) src/lib/str.ts — truncate(text, max, ellipsis='…') and titleCase(text). As the Solution Architect, scope these as three independent tasks; the engineer must IMPLEMENT all three with real edge-case tests and keep the suite green. These are deliberately parallel-isolatable (separate files) — implement them in parallel worktrees and merge cleanly.
acceptance_hint: Three new independent lib modules + their tests, suite green. PARALLEL-PATH validation: the engineer (Dev Clone) should isolate each independent task in its own git worktree/branch, merge them cleanly, and leave NO orphan worktrees/branches (.parallel cleaned). Judge: did the worktree-isolate-merge-clean path actually fire (independent tasks), and is the environment clean afterward?
notes: Validation seed for Dev Clone PARALLEL TASKS (Phase A): three deliberately-independent tasks to exercise worktree isolation + clean merge. Targets the 6-role team by id.
